examples: To drive troublemaking spirits away, friends would visit each other on their birthdays.
A picaresque novel is a work of fiction that details the exploits of an adventurous or troublemaking protagonist.

Aside from the late-night troublemaking that plagues many sports teams, life in the modern NFL involves dozens of hours per week in extra practice or film sessions.
